text: Upon entering this luminous, modern corridor, I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation. The stark cleanliness and reflective surfaces evoke thoughts about the intersection of technology and human experience. As I move closer to the exhibit with its vivid "R+D" display, the conceptual focus on research and development makes me ponder the ever-evolving relationship between humans and intelligent machines. Surrounded by screens and text, I feel small yet connected to a collective pursuit of knowledge, slightly disoriented by the tilted perspective but invigorated by the promise of discovery.
